title: lonicera × americana f. atrosanguinea
intro: Lonicera × americana f. atrosanguinea, also known as the American honeysuckle or red honeysuckle, is a deciduous, woody vine that belongs to the Caprifoliaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, derived from its flowers, leaves, and stems. The health benefits of Lonicera × americana f. atrosanguinea include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
